requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport — UN 38.3 for lithium batteries

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries are dangerous goods for international transport regardless of destination market. Shipments to Sri Lanka through the Port of Colombo (sea freight) or by air must satisfy the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) and the applicable modal rules: the IMDG Code for sea and the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air. Each cell/battery type requires a UN 38.3 test summary, proper UN classification (UN 3480/3481 lithium-ion or UN 3090/3091 lithium-metal), correct packing, marking, labelling, and documentation. This is a transport-safety obligation that applies independently of SLSI product conformity.
summary.zh: 锂电芯及电池在国际运输中无论目的地市场均属危险货物。经科伦坡港（海运）或经空运发往斯里兰卡的货物，须满足《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3节（UN 38.3）及适用的运输方式规则：海运适用IMDG规则，空运适用IATA危险货物规则/ICAO技术细则。每种电芯/电池型号须有UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN分类（锂离子UN 3480/3481或锂金属UN 3090/3091）、正确的包装、标记、标签及文件。该项为运输安全义务，独立于SLSI产品合格评定。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯及電池在國際運輸中無論目的地市場均屬危險貨物。經科倫坡港（海運）或經空運發往斯里蘭卡的貨物，須滿足《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節（UN 38.3）及適用的運輸方式規則：海運適用IMDG規則，空運適用IATA危險貨物規則/ICAO技術細則。每種電芯/電池型號須有UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN分類（鋰離子UN 3480/3481或鋰金屬UN 3090/3091）、正確的包裝、標記、標籤及文件。該項為運輸安全義務，獨立於SLSI產品合格評定。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport testing
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) for sea freight via the Port of Colombo
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air freight

summary.en: China applies the same international transport regime: lithium batteries leaving China must already meet UN 38.3 and carry a UN 38.3 test summary, and exporters typically hold this evidence for air and sea shipments. China also requires domestic transport/handling documentation (for example identification appraisal reports for dangerous goods and air-transport conditions identification). UN 38.3 evidence prepared for Chinese export is generally reusable for the Sri Lanka route, since UN 38.3 is an international standard.
summary.zh: 中国适用相同的国际运输制度：离开中国的锂电池须已满足UN 38.3并随附UN 38.3测试摘要，出口商通常为空运和海运备有该证据。中国还要求国内运输/操作文件（例如危险货物鉴定报告及航空运输条件鉴定）。为中国出口准备的UN 38.3证据通常可复用于斯里兰卡路径，因为UN 38.3是国际标准。
summary.zht: 中國適用相同的國際運輸制度：離開中國的鋰電池須已滿足UN 38.3並隨附UN 38.3測試摘要，出口商通常為空運和海運備有該證據。中國還要求國內運輸/操作文件（例如危險貨物鑑定報告及航空運輸條件鑑定）。為中國出口準備的UN 38.3證據通常可複用於斯里蘭卡路徑，因為UN 38.3是國際標準。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test summary held for Chinese export shipments
China dangerous-goods transport identification/appraisal documentation (air and sea conditions identification reports)

gap.en: Transport is the area of greatest overlap: UN 38.3 evidence prepared for Chinese export is generally reusable for shipments to Sri Lanka because UN 38.3, IMDG, and IATA are international. Remaining gaps are operational rather than standard-based: (1) ensure the UN 38.3 test summary matches the exact cell/pack model and any design change triggers retesting; (2) apply correct UN numbers, packing instructions, marks, and labels for the chosen mode into the Port of Colombo; (3) confirm any state-of-charge or quantity limits for the carrier. No additional Sri Lanka-specific transport standard replaces UN 38.3.
gap.zh: 运输是重叠度最高的领域：为中国出口准备的UN 38.3证据通常可复用于发往斯里兰卡的货物，因为UN 38.3、IMDG及IATA均为国际制度。剩余差距属操作层面而非标准层面：（1）确保UN 38.3测试摘要与具体电芯/电池组型号一致，任何设计变更触发重新测试；（2）按所选运输方式对进入科伦坡港的货物适用正确的UN编号、包装说明、标记及标签；（3）确认承运人的荷电状态或数量限制。无额外的斯里兰卡专用运输标准替代UN 38.3。
gap.zht: 運輸是重疊度最高的領域：為中國出口準備的UN 38.3證據通常可複用於發往斯里蘭卡的貨物，因為UN 38.3、IMDG及IATA均為國際制度。剩餘差距屬操作層面而非標準層面：（1）確保UN 38.3測試摘要與具體電芯/電池組型號一致，任何設計變更觸發重新測試；（2）按所選運輸方式對進入科倫坡港的貨物適用正確的UN編號、包裝說明、標記及標籤；（3）確認承運人的荷電狀態或數量限制。無額外的斯里蘭卡專用運輸標準替代UN 38.3。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for international transport — UN 38.3 plus IMDG (sea, Port of Colombo) or IATA/ICAO (air) classification, packing, marking, labelling, and documentation apply to all lithium-battery shipments into Sri Lanka
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods transport documentation required for lithium batteries leaving China

source.publisher: UNECE — Transport of Dangerous Goods (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 and the modal dangerous-goods rules (IMDG for sea via the Port of Colombo, IATA/ICAO for air) apply to lithium-battery shipments into Sri Lanka exactly as for any destination. UN 38.3 evidence prepared for Chinese export is generally reusable; the work is keeping the test summary matched to the model and applying correct classification, packing, marking, and labelling for the chosen transport mode.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3及运输方式危险货物规则（经科伦坡港海运适用IMDG，空运适用IATA/ICAO）适用于发往斯里兰卡的锂电池货物，与任何目的地相同。为中国出口准备的UN 38.3证据通常可复用；工作在于保持测试摘要与型号一致，并按所选运输方式正确分类、包装、标记及标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3及運輸方式危險貨物規則（經科倫坡港海運適用IMDG，空運適用IATA/ICAO）適用於發往斯里蘭卡的鋰電池貨物，與任何目的地相同。為中國出口準備的UN 38.3證據通常可複用；工作在於保持測試摘要與型號一致，並按所選運輸方式正確分類、包裝、標記及標籤。
